item.title: Mechanically Flexible Symmetric Metamaterial Absorber in UV to Visible Wavelength for Solar Energy and Optical Window Application
item.description:
Publication date: Available online 14 May 2026

Source: Journal of Materiomics

Author(s): Nazimul Mowla Chowdhury, Mosrur Hossain, Saif Hannan, Abdulmajeed M. Alenezi, Mohamad A. Alawad, Yazeed Alkhrijah, Mohammad Tariqul Islam
